shopping_433.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent misinterpreted "small-packet version." Instead of identifying products sold in individual, small-sized packets (e.g., 1 oz boxes, snack bags), the agent selected the cheapest single item that was simply a smaller overall quantity (20 oz) than the 4 lbs (64 oz) box shown in the objective image. The objective implied finding a product consisting of multiple small, individual servings, not just a smaller bulk container.
shopping_433.REFLECTION: When the objective specifies a "small-packet version" of a product, prioritize items explicitly described as "mini," "snack packs," "individual packets," or "1 oz boxes/bags" (or similar small, individual serving sizes). After identifying products that fit this description, compare their prices to find the cheapest option among them. Do not simply select the cheapest item that is a smaller total quantity than the original product, as this may not align with the "small-packet" intent.

The agent misinterpreted "small-packet version." Instead of identifying products sold in individual, small-sized packets (e.g., 1 oz boxes, snack bags), the agent selected the cheapest single item that was simply a smaller overall quantity (20 oz) than the 4 lbs (64 oz) box shown in the objective image. The objective implied finding a product consisting of multiple small, individual servings, not just a smaller bulk container.

REFLECTION:
When the objective specifies a "small-packet version" of a product, prioritize items explicitly described as "mini," "snack packs," "individual packets," or "1 oz boxes/bags" (or similar small, individual serving sizes). After identifying products that fit this description, compare their prices to find the cheapest option among them. Do not simply select the cheapest item that is a smaller total quantity than the original product, as this may not align with the "small-packet" intent.
